title: Compared to Estimates, Union Pacific (UNP) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics

title: Union Pacific (UNP) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Union Pacific (UNP) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.57 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.75 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.93 per share a year ago.

title: Union Pacific's New CEO Overshadows an Earnings Miss
text: The railroad said Jim Vena will take over as CEO next month.

title: Union Pacific stock jumps even as revenue misses on softening consumer markets, while CEO to step down after 8 years in the role
text: Shares of Union Pacific Corp. UNP, -0.64% shot up 8.8% toward an 11-month high in premarket trading Wednesday, after the railroad operator reported a second-quarter revenue miss amid softening consumer markets and higher labor costs, but said Chief Executive Lance Fritz is stepping down after more than eight years in the role. The company named Jim Vena as its new CEO, effective Aug. 14.

title: Union Pacific Corporation Declares Third Quarter 2023 Dividend

title: Union Pacific Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: Earnings per diluted share of $2.57 Operating revenue down 5% Reportable derailment rate improved 9% OMAHA, Neb. , July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) today reported 2023 second quarter net income of $1.6 billion, or $2.57 per diluted share.

title: Union Pacific Appoints Doyle Simons and John Wiehoff to Board of Directors

title: Union Pacific Appoints Jim Vena Chief Executive Officer
text: Beth Whited named president Mike McCarthy elected chairman of the Board OMAHA, Neb. , July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) today announced Jim Vena has been appointed as chief executive officer and a member of the Board, effective August 14, 2023.

title: Union Pacific Corporation Announces Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Release Date
text: OMAHA, Neb. , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) will release second quarter 2023 financial and operating results on Wednesday, July 26, 2023, at 7:45 a.m.

title: Union Pacific and SMART-TD hash out sick leave deal
text: Union Pacific has reached a sick leave agreement with the International Association of Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers (SMART-TD), the union group that represents train conductors. The tentative agreement, which would affect around 5,900 employees, provides up to eight paid sick leave days, UP (NYSE: UNP) said Sunday.

title: Union Pacific (UNP) & SMART-TD Ink Employee-Friendly Deal
text: Union Pacific's (UNP) tentative deal with SMART-TD, on ratification, is set to go a long way in promoting the well-being of employees.

title: Union Pacific and SMART-TD Ink Tentative Paid Sick Leave Agreement
text: Union Pacific now has ratified or tentative agreements with all 13 of its labor unions on important quality-of-life initiative OMAHA, Neb. , July 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Railroad and the International Association of Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers (SMART-TD) reached a tentative agreement to provide up to eight paid sick leave days to around 5,900 railroad employees.
